utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh my God , you are back !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ohh , let me see it ! Let me see your hand !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Why do you want to see my hand ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_Why do you want to see my hand ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I wanna see what in your hand . I wanna see the trash .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Eww ! Oh , it is all dirty . You should throw this out .
